text:
ありがとう！　やっぱり私の依頼を
引き受けてくれるのはあなたよね！
ほんと、感謝してる！

普通のミキサーでは、私の独創的な
料理についてこれないみたいで……
専用のを作るしかないって思ったの。

そのための準備は結構大変……
それはわかってる、それでも私は
チャレンジしてみたいのよ！

Thanks for coming by! You're always the one
who answers these crazy requests of mine.
I really appreciate it!

So, here's the situation. This blender of mine
can't quite keep up with what I'm trying to do,
so I'm out to make a new, more powerful one.

It's gonna take a lot of work, that much
I know, but I don't want to give up before
I even try!

And that's why I want your help!
Thanks in advance!
